name: Mul
description: Humanoid. Medium. Muls are bred for endurance and labor. Relentless Endurance: when you are reduced to 0 Hit Points but not killed outright, you can drop to 1 Hit Point instead once per Long Rest. Inexhaustible: when you would gain exhaustion from natural hazards such as dehydration, malnutrition, lack of sleep, or extended exertion, you may make a DC 10 Constitution saving throw to resist the effect; this does not apply to spells or spell-like abilities. Toughness: your Hit Point maximum increases by 1, and it increases by 1 again whenever you gain a level.
